assertions.title: Filter + pagination + sort compose correctly across all new features

steps.action: Open /fixtures/cross-area and apply strict composed filters: search='3', status='New', insurer='Citizens Property Insurance', sort='Score (high→low)'
steps.expected: All constraints stay active simultaneously with non-default status/insurer/sort
steps.observed: Filters and sort remained active together; result set showed 29 leads found under the strict composed state.

steps.action: Navigate explicitly to page 2 while strict composed filters remain active
steps.expected: Page 2 is reachable without clearing or changing active constraints
steps.observed: Pagination advanced to 'Page 2 of 2'; active search/status/insurer/sort selections remained unchanged.

steps.action: Validate page-2 rows still satisfy constraints and score order
steps.expected: Visible rows on page 2 match search text + status New + insurer Citizens and remain score-sorted
steps.observed: Page-2 visible scores were 71, 70, 69, 63 (descending). Spot-checks via drawer for Paul Martinez, Michael Fitzgerald, Susan Parker, and Vincent Caro all showed insurer='Citizens Property Insurance' and status='New', with row content matching search text '3'.

evidence.network: agent-browser network capture returned no requests for this session.

frictions.description: One click attempt used a stale element reference after drawer state changed, causing a timeout.
frictions.resolution: Refreshed refs with a new snapshot and retried interaction successfully.

summary: VAL-CROSS-003 passed: strict composed filters (search + non-default status + non-default insurer + score sort) remained active through explicit navigation to page 2, and page-2 leads preserved constraints with descending score order.
